creator: eduardo.viruena@esfm.ipn.mx
text:
I have an Intel SE440BX-2 Intel Motherboard, an Encore 6 DVD and a Creative 48x CD
both of them in the secondary IDE,  DVD is master and CD slave.
I have not been able to make my computer boot from CD even though other operating
systems can do it.

How-To-Repeat: Set BIOS's boot options so that CD be the boot device.
Try to boot your computer with your CD on either DVD driver or CD driver.
